description: Run an explicit-solvent OpenMM molecular dynamics simulation of a protein in water.
functions: Prepares the input protein with PDBFixer (standardizes residues, adds missing atoms and hydrogens at the specified pH).
Parameterizes with Amber ff14SB and solvates in a TIP3P water box with neutralizing Na+/Cl- ions via tleap.
Runs energy minimization, restrained equilibration (full then reduced heavy-atom restraints), and unrestrained NPT production with Langevin dynamics.
Post-processes the production trajectory with PBC correction, Cα alignment, and downsampling for analysis.
Computes Cα RMSD, radius of gyration, per-residue RMSF, 2D RMSD, and residue-wise Pearson cross-correlation, saving plots and CSVs.

inputs.name: protein
inputs.descr: Input protein structure (PDB). Het atoms and crystallographic waters are stripped before simulation.
